common.trees-description: Here are all your families. You can create new ones or manage existing ones
common.app-description: Explore your family connections and strengthen your roots
common.app-issues: If you detect any problem or bug, feel free to
common.unavailable-feature: This feature is not available in this beta version.
common.error-description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

toasts.node-delete-confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this member?
toasts.node-delete-confirm-description: This will also delete all their relationships. This action cannot be undone.
toasts.node-picture-delete-confirm-description: Are you sure you want to delete this image from the gallery? This action cannot be undone.

errors.error-tree-exists: A family with this name already exists.
errors.error-tree-admin-required: At least one admin user is required.
errors.error-no-permission: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.error-user-already-in-tree: User is already a member of the family.
errors.error-email-in-use: This email is already in use.
errors.error-cannot-connect-to-self: Cannot connect a person to themselves.
errors.alias-too-long: Alias cannot be longer than 16 characters.
errors.username-too-long: Username cannot be longer than 40 characters.
errors.error-nodes-not-found: One or more members not found.
errors.error-relationship-already-exists: A relationship already exists between these members.
errors.error-cannot-connect-to-self: Cannot create a relationship with the same member.
errors.error-would-create-cycle: This relationship would create a family cycle.
errors.error-cannot-connect-siblings: Cannot create a parent-child relationship between siblings.
errors.error-child-has-max-parents: A child cannot have more than 2 parents.
errors.error-picture-upload: An error occurred while uploading the image.
errors.error-picture-too-large: The image file is too large. Maximum size is 20MB.
errors.error-picture-delete: An error occurred while deleting the image.
errors.error-picture-at-least-one-tag: The picture must have at least one tag.
errors.error-tag-already-exists: This picture is already tagged with this member.
errors.error-tag-create: An error occurred while adding the tag.
errors.error-tag-remove: An error occurred while removing the tag.

login.login-text: Explore your family connections and strengthen your roots
login.login-error: An error occurred while signing in.
login.build-your-tree-description: Create and explore your family connections
login.share-memories-description: Preserve stories and photos for future generations
login.private-and-secure-description: Your family data stays safe and private

insights.milestones-description: Here you can see upcoming birthdays and notable events of your family members.
insights.milestones-empty: There are no birthdays or anniversaries in the coming days.
insights.birthday-description: {name} is turning {age, plural, one {# year} other {# years}} {daysUntil, plural, =0 {today} one {in 1 day} other {in # days}}
insights.anniversary-description: {type, select, birth {{name} was born {yearsAgo, plural, one {# year ago} other {# years ago}}} death {In memory of {name}, {yearsAgo, plural, one {# year ago} other {# years ago}}} other {}}
insights.memories-on-this-week: Memories of this week over the years
insights.memory-description: {yearsAgo, plural, =0 {This year} one {# year ago} other {# years ago}}
insights.show-more: Show {count, plural, one {# more} other {# more}}
insights.highlights-description: Discover interesting facts and statistics about your family trees.
insights.highlights-empty: There are no highlights available for your families yet. Start adding members and relationships to see interesting insights here.

trees.title: Families
trees.tree-create-description: Fill in the data below to create a new family.
trees.tree-edit-description: Modify the data and settings of your family below.
trees.tree-name-description: This is the name that will identify your family within the application.
trees.name: Name
trees.tree-types-info: The styling and features may vary based on the selected type.
trees.tree-types-alert: Bear in mind that this choice is permanent and cannot be changed later.
trees.tree-newsletter-weekly-info: If enabled, all family members will receive weekly email updates with recent changes and highlights from the family tree.
trees.tree-members-info: Manage the users who have access to this family.
trees.tree-member-role: The role determines the level of access the user has within the family.
trees.tree-member-remove-confirm-description: Are you sure you want to remove this user from the family?
trees.node-new-description: Fill in the data below to add a new member to the family.
trees.node-fullname-description: Enter the full name of the new member.
trees.node-alias-description: Enter any nicknames for the new member (optional).
trees.node-birth-place-description: Enter the birth place of the new member (optional).
trees.node-birth-date-description: Enter the birth date of the new member.
trees.node-death-place-description: Enter the death place of the new member (optional).
trees.node-death-date-description: Enter the death date of the new member (optional).
trees.node-gender-description: Select the gender of the new member.
trees.node-biography-description: Here you can write a brief biography or notes about this family member.
trees.node-info-description: Here you can view and modify the personal information of this family member.
trees.node-gallery-description: Here you can view and manage the image gallery of this family member.
trees.node-gallery-empty: This member has no pictures in their gallery.
trees.recent-activity-description: Here you can see the most recent changes made to this family.
trees.timeline-description: Explore the events and important moments in the history of this family.

profile.title: Settings
profile.description: Here you can view and modify your personal information.
profile.name: Name
profile.name-description: This name will be displayed on your profile and shared with your families.
profile.email-description: This email address is associated with your profile and cannot be changed.
profile.email-hint: Email address is managed by your OAuth provider.
profile.email-unmatched: The email address does not match.
profile.newsletter-description: If enabled, you will receive weekly emails with updates and highlights from your families.
profile.newsletter-description-alert: Make sure the newsletter is enabled for each of your families.
profile.language-description: Select the preferred language for both application and communications.
profile.account-delete-text: This will permanently delete your account. Your family trees will be handled as follows:
profile.account-delete-trees-solo: Trees where you are the only member will be permanently deleted.
profile.account-delete-trees-shared: For shared trees, ownership will be transferred to another admin (or promoted member if needed).
profile.account-delete-prompt: To confirm, please type your email address:
profile.account-delete-error: An error occurred while deleting your account.
profile.account-logout-text: Are you sure you want to log out?
profile.account-logout-error: An error occurred while logging out.

welcome.subject: Welcome to Roots, {name}!
welcome.title: Welcome to Roots!
welcome.subtitle: Start preserving your family's story
welcome.intro: Thank you for joining Roots! We're thrilled to help you preserve and share your family's story.
welcome.step-2: Add family members and their stories
welcome.help: If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reach out. We're here to help you every step of the way.
welcome.footer: You're receiving this email because you created an account on Roots.

invitation.subject: {inviter} invited you to {tree}
invitation.title: You've been invited!
invitation.subtitle: Join a family tree collaboration
invitation.intro: has invited you to collaborate on the family tree
invitation.permission-base-2: this family tree. Click the button below to get started.
invitation.link: Or copy and paste this URL into your browser:
invitation.help: If you have any questions about how to use Roots, we're here to help.
invitation.footer: This invitation was sent by {inviter}. If you weren't expecting this email, you can safely ignore it.

newsletter.subject: Weekly Update: {tree}
newsletter.title: Weekly family tree update
newsletter.new-members-empty: No new members were added this week.
newsletter.upcoming-events-empty: No upcoming birthdays or anniversaries in the next week.
newsletter.help: Want to change your email preferences? You can do so in your profile settings.
newsletter.footer: You're receiving this email because you're subscribed to weekly updates for this family tree.

share.title: Share family tree
share.description: Anyone with the link can view this family tree. They'll need to sign in or create an account.
share.no-active-link: No active share link. Generate one below.
share.expires-in: Expires in {days, plural, =1 {# day} other {# days}}
share.error-invalid: This share link is invalid or no longer active.
share.error-generic: We couldn't process this share link.
